query:
SELECT ao.id, ao.name, ao.priceExtra, ag.name as groupName, mi.name as itemName, mi.id as itemId
FROM menu_addon_options ao
JOIN menu_addon_groups ag ON ao.groupId = ag.id
JOIN menu_items mi ON ag.menuItemId = mi.id
WHERE (ao.name LIKE '%frango%' OR ao.name LIKE '%lingu%' OR ao.name LIKE '%bovina%' OR ao.name LIKE '%retirar%' OR ag.name LIKE '%churrasco%' OR ag.name LIKE '%carne%')
AND (mi.name LIKE '%armitex%' OR mi.name LIKE '%radicional%')
ORDER BY mi.name, ao.name
LIMIT 30;

JOIN menu_items mi ON ag.menuItemId = mi.id
WHERE (ao.name LIKE '%frango%' OR ao.name LIKE '%lingu%' OR ao.name LIKE '%bovina%' OR ao.name LIKE '%retirar%' OR ag.name LIKE '%churrasco%' OR ag.name LIKE '%carne%')
AND (mi.name LIKE '%armitex%' OR mi.name LIKE '%radicional%')
ORDER BY mi.name, ao.name
LIMIT 30;
